facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and stumble onto Pacific Boat. No resort crowd. No tour-group noise. Just boats, water, and a 4.7-star rating from 169 people who clearly found it first. Cửa Lấp doesn't get the hype it deserves. This spot is proof. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Boats lined up at Pacific Boat, Cửa Lấp. 4.7 stars. 169 reviews. And you've probably never seen it on anyone's feed. That changes now.

instagram.caption: Walked past the resorts. Found Pacific Boat in Cửa Lấp. 4.7 stars, 169 reviews, and zero crowds. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: 4.7 stars on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Boats, water, no resort noise. Cửa Lấp delivers.
